rows.label: tlk45320391_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Superbia is under attack!
What reason could we have
to remain here?

rows.label: tlk45320391_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Once we annihilate the enemy
before us, we return to
Superbia at once!

rows.label: tlk45320391_03_msg0003
rows.name:
If anything happened to Emperor
Nefer while we were in Judicium,
we'd be executed!

rows.label: tlk45320391_03_msg0004
rows.name:
We return to Superbia even
if it costs us our lives!
